sub_modules.fp_fir_sample_select: Combinational selector that forms the current FIR window from the incoming sample and shifted history.
sub_modules.fp_highpass_coeff_rom: Combinational coefficient ROM for the 101 binary32 high-pass FIR tap words.
sub_modules.fp_add_comb: Combinational binary32 add wrapper used by the FIR reduction chain.
sub_modules.fp_real_math: Shared combinational floating-point arithmetic implementation for simulation-compatible binary32 add and multiply.
